allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "g:\\Outros computadores\\Meu laptop \(2\)\\Zyntra"; Get-ChildItem "modules\\Faturamento" -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne 'node_modules' -and $_.Name -ne '.git' } | Format-Table Name, Mode -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Set-Location "g:\\Outros computadores\\Meu laptop \(2\)\\Zyntra"; $a = \(Get-FileHash "modules\\PCP\\pages\\relatorios.html" -Algorithm SHA256\).Hash; $b = \(Get-FileHash "modules\\PCP\\pages\\relatórios.html" -Algorithm SHA256\).Hash; Write-Output "relatorios.html : $a"; Write-Output "relatórios.html: $b"; Write-Output "iguais=$\($a -eq $b\)")

PowerShell($root = "g:\\.shortcut-targets-by-id\\1cwjbEHD82YI8KNdhYtxmMhyZezb1IsFN\\Zyntra"; Get-ChildItem $root -Force | Select-Object Name, @{Label="Type";Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){"DIR"}else{"FILE"}}} | Sort-Object Name)

PowerShell($root = "g:\\.shortcut-targets-by-id\\1cwjbEHD82YI8KNdhYtxmMhyZezb1IsFN\\Zyntra"; Get-ChildItem "$root\\modules" -Force | Select-Object Name, @{Label="Type";Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){"DIR"}else{"FILE"}}} | Sort-Object Name)

PowerShell($root = "g:\\.shortcut-targets-by-id\\1cwjbEHD82YI8KNdhYtxmMhyZezb1IsFN\\Zyntra"; foreach \($mod in @\("Vendas", "Financeiro", "PCP", "Compras", "RH", "NFe", "Logistica", "Admin"\)\) { Write-Host "`n=== $mod ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; ls "$root\\modules\\$mod" 2>$null | Select-Object Name, @{Label="Type";Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){"DIR"}else{"FILE"}}} | Sort-Object Name })

PowerShell($root = "g:\\.shortcut-targets-by-id\\1cwjbEHD82YI8KNdhYtxmMhyZezb1IsFN\\Zyntra"; Write-Host "=== SRC ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; ls "$root\\src"; Write-Host "`n=== BASE ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; ls "$root\\Base")

PowerShell($root = "g:\\.shortcut-targets-by-id\\1cwjbEHD82YI8KNdhYtxmMhyZezb1IsFN\\Zyntra"; Write-Host "=== Base/Sistema ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; \(ls "$root\\Base\\Sistema" 2>$null | Measure-Object\).Count; Write-Host "First 20 items:"; ls "$root\\Base\\Sistema" 2>$null | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($root = "g:\\.shortcut-targets-by-id\\1cwjbEHD82YI8KNdhYtxmMhyZezb1IsFN\\Zyntra"; Write-Host "=== PUBLIC ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; \(ls "$root\\public" -Recurse 2>$null | Where-Object {!$_.PSIsContainer} | Measure-Object\).Count; ls "$root\\public" 2>$null | Select-Object Name, @{Label="Type";Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){"DIR"}else{"FILE"}}} | Sort-Object Name)

PowerShell($root = "g:\\.shortcut-targets-by-id\\1cwjbEHD82YI8KNdhYtxmMhyZezb1IsFN\\Zyntra"; Write-Host "=== MIDDLEWARE ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; \(ls "$root\\middleware" 2>$null | Measure-Object\).Count; ls "$root\\middleware" 2>$null; Write-Host "`n=== _SHARED ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; \(ls "$root\\_shared" 2>$null | Measure-Object\).Count; ls "$root\\_shared" 2>$null)

PowerShell($root = "g:\\.shortcut-targets-by-id\\1cwjbEHD82YI8KNdhYtxmMhyZezb1IsFN\\Zyntra"; Write-Host "=== ASSETS ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; \(ls "$root\\assets" -Recurse 2>$null | Where-Object {!$_.PSIsContainer} | Measure-Object\).Count; Write-Host "=== API ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; \(ls "$root\\api" 2>$null | Measure-Object\).Count; ls "$root\\api" 2>$null | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($root = "g:\\.shortcut-targets-by-id\\1cwjbEHD82YI8KNdhYtxmMhyZezb1IsFN\\Zyntra"; Write-Host "=== KEY FILE SIZES ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; ls "$root\\server.js", "$root\\modules\\Vendas\\server.js" 2>$null | Select-Object Name, @{Label="Size\(KB\)";Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB, 2\)}}; Write-Host "`n=== SERVICES ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; \(ls "$root\\services" 2>$null | Measure-Object\).Count; ls "$root\\services" 2>$null | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($root = "g:\\.shortcut-targets-by-id\\1cwjbEHD82YI8KNdhYtxmMhyZezb1IsFN\\Zyntra"; Write-Host "=== SRC/CONTROLLERS ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; \(ls "$root\\src\\controllers" 2>$null | Measure-Object\).Count; Write-Host "=== SRC/SERVICES ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; \(ls "$root\\src\\services" 2>$null | Measure-Object\).Count; ls "$root\\src\\services" 2>$null | Select-Object -First 15)

PowerShell($root = "g:\\.shortcut-targets-by-id\\1cwjbEHD82YI8KNdhYtxmMhyZezb1IsFN\\Zyntra"; Write-Host "=== SRC/MODELS ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; \(ls "$root\\src\\models" 2>$null | Measure-Object\).Count; ls "$root\\src\\models" 2>$null; Write-Host "`n=== SRC/ROUTES ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; \(ls "$root\\src\\routes" 2>$null | Measure-Object\).Count; ls "$root\\src\\routes" 2>$null)
